title: PR #128 merged: Reduce inventory worker concurrency
summary: PR #128 merged to reduce inventory worker concurrency; the team later observed checkout latency return to its prior range.
body: The PR changed checkout-api worker configuration after a latency spike was recorded. The timing may be relevant, but this fixture does not establish root cause.
author: ada

title: Incident note #120: checkout-api p95 latency spike
summary: An incident note records increased checkout-api p95 latency after an inventory-related release.
body: The note links the timing of the release and latency spike for review. It does not claim that the release caused the spike.
author: morgan
